design_philosophy: Serene clinical sophistication. Trust-inspiring, editorial, and premium. Generous spacing with an Apple-style crystal glassmorphism aesthetic over organic, textured backgrounds (grain/noise). Asymmetric layouts to break the generic medical blue standard.

typography.heading_strategy: Tight letter spacing (tracking-tight), fluid scaling up to text-6xl. No standard Inter or Roboto. Rotate font weights intentionally.
typography.body_strategy: Clean, highly legible, leading-relaxed for long-form medical explanations.

glassmorphism.note: Use crystal glassmorphism for floating navs, sticky headers, and modal overlays. For heavy data charts in the dashboard, fallback to Solid Backgrounds to prevent visual refraction of data.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (2-3x). Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for containers. Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.

landing_page.grid: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris Grid). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with wide gap-8 to gap-12.
landing_page.hero: Asymmetric hero with max overlay opacity bg-black/40 (dark) or bg-white/30 (light).

dashboard.grid: Control Room Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Use h-full on children to ensure they stretch.

framer_motion.hover: Scale 1.02 on interactive cards, text color brightens.
framer_motion.page_transition: Fade in with slight upward translation (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> 1, duration: 0.4s).
framer_motion.stagger: List items (medicines, hospital lists) should stagger in with 0.1s delay.

motion.ocr_animation: Scanning laser effect using Framer Motion (animated line traversing the document bounds) with glowing blur-md.

components.navigation: Sticky header (z-50) using crystal glassmorphism. Desktop links fully visible. Mobile hamburger.
components.buttons: Rounded-full or rounded-xl (Apple style). Primary CTA uses primary color. Hover state must explicitly define text color.
components.charts: Shadcn/Recharts. Use semantic colors. Dark mode charts must have solid dark background for legibility.
components.forms: Shadcn inputs heavily customized. Padding expanded (h-12), subtle border focus ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/50). Never use native <input>.
components.tabs: Override Shadcn tablist height from h-9 to h-auto to fit longer text.
components.risk_gauge: D3.js or SVG based semi-circle gauge. 0-100 animated fill using semantic colors (green -> yellow -> orange -> red).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 for standard text. Use text shadow over images.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='upload-prescription-btn').

media_and_assets.icons: lucide-react (default for standard interactions) + @phosphor-icons/react (for high-end duotone clinical icons).
media_and_assets.grain_overlay: Fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none opacity-[0.03] z-50 bg-[url('data:image/svg+xml,...noise...')] (Implementation detail left to agent, but required for depth).

hero_background.description: Clean, well-equipped modern medical examination room. Use with heavy gradient overlay.

abstract_texture.description: Abstract green painting. Use as subtle background texture for the risk score or AI copilot section.

clinic_secondary.description: Minimalist examination room for secondary features (e.g., Caregiver section).

instructions_to_main_agent: NOTE: The application strictly uses .js/.jsx files (JavaScript), not TypeScript. DO NOT create .tsx files.
Initialize Tailwind config with Outfit and Manrope fonts. Ensure both weights (Light, Regular, Medium, Bold) are imported via Google Fonts or standard imports.

Setup Shadcn UI using Javascript. Configure standard components (Card, Button, Input, Dialog, Tabs) but override their default borders/shadows to match the 'glassmorphism' and 'cards' specs in this JSON.
Implement light/dark mode toggle using next-themes or raw React context. Ensure all custom colors from this JSON map to CSS variables.
For the OCR upload, build a dropzone with a 'scanning' Framer Motion animation.
For the AI Copilot and Emergency panels, use generous padding (p-6/p-8) and ensure strong contrast ratios.
Do NOT use Inter or Roboto anywhere.
Add data-testid to every single button, link, tab, and form input (e.g., data-testid='login-button').
Build the dashboard using CSS Grid (md:grid-cols-3 or 4) with varying row spans for bento-box asymmetry.
Use Phosphor icons (@phosphor-icons/react) or Lucide React for medical specific iconography.
